title: Dog Cooling Mat,2025 New Washable Portable Pet Coolings Pad for Dogs & Cats Sleeping Mat for Home & Outdoor, Keep Cooling for Pets (Blue, 50 * 40cm)
features: 【Ideal for Small and Medium Breeds】Specifically designed for small to medium-sized pets, this durable cooling mat is made of soft cotton and built to withstand regular use. Perfect for puppies, kittens, and other small animals.

【Pets Cooling Mat】This pet cooling mat provides a breathable and comfortable surface for dogs and cats, ensuring optimal airflow. Ideal for hot summer days or after playtime, it helps your furry friend stay cool and relaxed.

【Lightweight & Travel-Friendly】Featuring a lightweight, foldable design, this cooling mat is easy to carry and store—perfect for travel, outdoor trips, or use at home. Keep your pet cool anywhere you go.

【Multi-Purpose Comfort】With 30% more cotton filling than standard mats, it offers enhanced softness and comfort. Use it on its own or place it on your dog’s bed to transform it into a cozy, cooling sleeping area.
【Washable & Reusable】This reusable pet cooling pad is easy to clean, promoting hygiene and long-term use. Simply wash and reuse to keep your pet’s resting spot fresh and odor-free.
